        width: 100%;
        height: auto;
        float: center;

markdown.markdown:
:::: {.grid} ::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-12}
--- ::: ::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-lg-4 .title-block} ![](images/IMG_0354.JPEG){.img-fluid} ::: ::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-lg-8 .title-block .text-block} ## Details{#details} --- _Date_ \ **Sunday, Dec 6th, 2026** --- _Time_ \ **3:00 PM to 8:00 PM** --- _Dress Code_ \ **Semi-Formal / Cocktail Attire** --- Please don't forget to [RSVP](www.google.com) by XX.XX.XX! \ _Wai + Kathleen_ ::: ::: {.g-col-12 .title-block .text-block} ## Location{#location} --- ### Dove Canyon Courtyard [31981 Dove Canyon Drive, Dove Canyon, CA 92679](https://www.google.com/maps?cid=6769603451629656288&g_mp=CiVnb29nbGUubWFwcy5wbGFjZXMudjEuUGxhY2VzLkdldFBsYWNlEAIYASAA&hl=en&gl=US&source=embed) \ The ceremony and reception will both be held at the same location. \ ::: ::: {.g-col-12 .title-block .text-block} ## Wedding Registry{#registry} --- Your presence at our wedding is the greatest gift of all! However, if you wish to honor us with a gift, a contribution toward our future together would be wonderful. **We will have a card box available at the reception for your convenience.** \ For those who prefer to shop online, our registry can be found below: \ * [Link to Registry 1](#) * [Link to Registry 2](#) ::: ::: {.g-col-12 .title-block .text-block} ## Catering Menu{#catering} --- ::: {.callout-important collapse="false"} Please let us know ahead of time if you have any dietary restrictions. ::: _Cocktail Hour_ \ * **Selection A** * **Selection B** _Main Course_ \ * **Beef:** [e.g., Herb-Crusted Filet Mignon with Roasted Asparagus] * **Fish:** [e.g., Pan-Seared Salmon with Lemon Caper Butter] * **Vegetarian:** [e.g., Wild Mushroom Risotto] _Dessert_ \ * **Wedding Cake & Coffee Bar** ::: ::: {.g-col-12 .title-block .text-block} ## Frequently Asked Questions{#faqs} --- ::: {.callout-tip collapse="false"} ### Is there parking at the venue? Yes, there is a parking lot on-site. ::: ::: {.callout-tip collapse="false"} ### Are kids welcome? Yes, we love kids! But, please do indicate ahead in your RSVP if you are bringing kids. ::: ::: {.callout-tip collapse="false"} ### Are pets welcome? We love our furry friends! But, please note that our wedding is a pet-free event. We love your animals, but we kindly ask that you leave them at home so you can enjoy the celebration to the fullest. ::: ::: {.callout-tip collapse="false"} ### What will the weather be like? Expect Southern California weather! It should be warm during the day but might cool down in the evening, so we recommend bringing a light jacket or wrap. ::: ::: ::: {.g-col-12 .title-block .text-block} ## Contact Us{#contact} --- If you have any questions that aren't covered in the FAQs, or need to reach out to us regarding your RSVP, please let us know! #### Wai Phyo **Phone:** (415) 692-8896 \ **Email:** [wphyo3820@gmail.com](mailto:wphyo3820@gmail.com) #### Kathleen Nguyen **Phone:** (619) 902-9544 \ **Email:** [kathleen.wai0517@gmail.com](mailto:kathleen.wai0517@gmail.com) #### Day of Wedding Contact *If you're unable to reach us on the day of our wedding, please reach out to our coordinator / Maid of Honor / Best Man, [Name], at [Phone Number].* ::: \ ::::

:::: {.grid} ::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-12} ## Hi, we're getting married!{#home}
--- ::: ::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-lg-4 .title-block} ![](images/IMG_0354.JPEG){.img-fluid} ::: ::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-lg-8 .title-block .text-block} ## Details{#details} --- _Date_ \ **Sunday, Dec 6th, 2026** --- _Time_ \ **3:00 PM to 8:00 PM** --- _Dress Code_ \ **Semi-Formal / Cocktail Attire** --- Please don't forget to [RSVP](www.google.com) by XX.XX.XX! \ _Wai + Kathleen_ ::: ::: {.g-col-12 .title-block .text-block} ## Location{#location} --- ### Dove Canyon Courtyard [31981 Dove Canyon Drive, Dove Canyon, CA 92679](https://www.google.com/maps?cid=6769603451629656288&g_mp=CiVnb29nbGUubWFwcy5wbGFjZXMudjEuUGxhY2VzLkdldFBsYWNlEAIYASAA&hl=en&gl=US&source=embed) \ The ceremony and reception will both be held at the same location. \ ::: ::: {.g-col-12 .title-block .text-block} ## Wedding Registry{#registry} --- Your presence at our wedding is the greatest gift of all! However, if you wish to honor us with a gift, a contribution toward our future together would be wonderful. **We will have a card box available at the reception for your convenience.** \ For those who prefer to shop online, our registry can be found below: \ * [Link to Registry 1](#) * [Link to Registry 2](#) ::: ::: {.g-col-12 .title-block .text-block} ## Catering Menu{#catering} --- ::: {.callout-important collapse="false"} Please let us know ahead of time if you have any dietary restrictions. ::: _Cocktail Hour_ \ * **Selection A** * **Selection B** _Main Course_ \ * **Beef:** [e.g., Herb-Crusted Filet Mignon with Roasted Asparagus] * **Fish:** [e.g., Pan-Seared Salmon with Lemon Caper Butter] * **Vegetarian:** [e.g., Wild Mushroom Risotto] _Dessert_ \ * **Wedding Cake & Coffee Bar** ::: ::: {.g-col-12 .title-block .text-block} ## Frequently Asked Questions{#faqs} --- ::: {.callout-tip collapse="false"} ### Is there parking at the venue? Yes, there is a parking lot on-site. ::: ::: {.callout-tip collapse="false"} ### Are kids welcome? Yes, we love kids! But, please do indicate ahead in your RSVP if you are bringing kids. ::: ::: {.callout-tip collapse="false"} ### Are pets welcome? We love our furry friends! But, please note that our wedding is a pet-free event. We love your animals, but we kindly ask that you leave them at home so you can enjoy the celebration to the fullest. ::: ::: {.callout-tip collapse="false"} ### What will the weather be like? Expect Southern California weather! It should be warm during the day but might cool down in the evening, so we recommend bringing a light jacket or wrap. ::: ::: ::: {.g-col-12 .title-block .text-block} ## Contact Us{#contact} --- If you have any questions that aren't covered in the FAQs, or need to reach out to us regarding your RSVP, please let us know! #### Wai Phyo **Phone:** (415) 692-8896 \ **Email:** [wphyo3820@gmail.com](mailto:wphyo3820@gmail.com) #### Kathleen Nguyen **Phone:** (619) 902-9544 \ **Email:** [kathleen.wai0517@gmail.com](mailto:kathleen.wai0517@gmail.com) #### Day of Wedding Contact *If you're unable to reach us on the day of our wedding, please reach out to our coordinator / Maid of Honor / Best Man, [Name], at [Phone Number].* ::: \ ::::
